WHO Immunization Implementation Guide, published by WHO. This guide is not an authorized publication; it is the continuous build for version 0.2.0 built by the FHIR (HL7® FHIR® Standard) CI Build. This version is based on the current content of https://github.com/WorldHealthOrganization/smart-immunizations/tree/dak-extract and changes regularly. See the Directory of published versions

    <div xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml"><p class="res-header-id"><b>Generated Narrative: CodeSystem DT</b></p><a name="DT"> </a><a name="hcDT"> </a><p><b>Properties</b></p><p><b>This code system defines the following properties for its concepts</b></p><table class="grid"><tr><td><b>Name</b></td><td><b>Code</b></td><td><b>Type</b></td><td><b>Description</b></td></tr><tr><td>table</td><td>table</td><td>string</td><td>Decision Table ID</td></tr><tr><td>tab</td><td>tab</td><td>string</td><td>Decision Tab</td></tr></table><p><b>Concepts</b></p><p>This case-insensitive code system <code>http://smart.who.int/immunizations/CodeSystem/DT</code> defines the following codes:</p><table class="codes"><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap"><b>Code</b></td><td><b>Display</b></td><td><b>Definition</b></td><td><b>table</b></td><td><b>tab</b></td><td><b>CQL</b></td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">Number of BCG primary series doses administered<a name="DT-NumberofBCGprimaryseriesdosesadministered"> </a></td><td>Count of vaccines administered (where &quot;Vaccine type&quot; = &quot;BCG vaccines&quot; and &quot;Type of dose&quot; = &quot;Primary series&quot;)</td><td><div><p>Count of vaccines administered (where &quot;Vaccine type&quot; = &quot;BCG vaccines&quot; and &quot;Type of dose&quot; = &quot;Primary series&quot;)

</td></tr><tr><td style="white-space:nowrap">Countries where varicella is an important public health burden could consider introducing varicella vaccination in the routine childhood immunization programme. However, resources should be sufficient to ensure reaching and sustaining vaccine coverage ≥ 80%. Decision-making on childhood varicella vaccination should also include consideration of the possible impact on herpes zoster.<a name="DT-Countrieswherevaricellaisanimportantpublichealthburdencouldconsiderintroducingvaricellavaccinationintheroutinechildhoodimmunizationprogramme.46However.44resourcesshouldbesufficienttoensurereachingandsustainingvaccinecoverage.880580.37.46Decision-makingonchildhoodvaricellavaccinationshouldalsoincludeconsiderationofthepossibleimpactonherpeszoster.46"> </a></td><td>The number of doses recommended is dependent on the goal of the vaccination programme. One dose is sufficient to reduce mortality and severe morbidity from varicella but not to prevent limited virus circulation and outbreaks. Two doses have higher effectiveness and should therefore be recommended in countries where the programmatic goal is, in addition to decreasing mortality and severe morbidity, to further reduce the number of cases and outbreaks.</td><td><div><p>The number of doses recommended is dependent on the goal of the vaccination programme. One dose is sufficient to reduce mortality and severe morbidity from varicella but not to prevent limited virus circulation and outbreaks. Two doses have higher effectiveness and should therefore be recommended in countries where the programmatic goal is, in addition to decreasing mortality and severe morbidity, to further reduce the number of cases and outbreaks.
Referenced in the following locations:</p>
<ul>

             value="//Found in input/cql/IMMZElements.cql

define &quot;Client is currently receiving antiretroviral therapy&quot;:
  //CQL AUTHORS: you need to insert stuff here

//Found in input/cql/IMMZEncounterElements.cql

define &quot;Client is currently receiving antiretroviral therapy&quot;:
  Elements.&quot;Currently on ART Observation&quot;.encounterOrOnBefore(EncounterId, Today).mostRecent().value = true



//Found in input/cql/IMMZD2DTBCGElements.cql

define &quot;Client is currently receiving antiretroviral therapy&quot;:
  Elements.&quot;Client is currently receiving antiretroviral therapy&quot;

//Found in input/cql/IMMZEncounterElements.cql

define &quot;The client is exposed to immunosuppressive treatment&quot;:
  exists &quot;CI Exposed to immunosuppressive treatment Observation&quot;
    or exists &quot;CI Exposed to immunosuppressive treatment Condition&quot;


"/>

             value="//Found in input/cql/IMMZD2DTTyphoidElements.cql

define &quot;Primary series is complete&quot;:
  &quot;One typhoid primary series dose was administered&quot;
  or Coalesce( 
    &quot;Typhoid Doses Administered to Patient&quot; Dose
    aggregate Result: Elements.&quot;Completed the primary vaccination series Observation&quot;.partOf.references(Dose) or Result, 
    false )

  or Coalesce(

    aggregate Result: Encounter.&quot;Completed the primary vaccination series Observation&quot;.partOf.references(Dose) or Result,

  <concept>
    <code
          value="Primary DTP series is complete. Client is not due for tetanus and diphtheria booster dose"/>
    <display
             value="&quot;Immunization recommendation status&quot; = &quot;Not due&quot; (where &quot;Vaccine type&quot; =&quot;Tetanus and diphtheria-containing vaccines&quot;)
&quot;Completed the primary vaccination series&quot; = TRUE (where &quot;Vaccine type&quot; = &quot;DTP-containing vaccines&quot;)"/>
    <definition
                value="&quot;Immunization recommendation status&quot; = &quot;Not due&quot; (where &quot;Vaccine type&quot; =&quot;Tetanus and diphtheria-containing vaccines&quot;)
&quot;Completed the primary vaccination series&quot; = TRUE (where &quot;Vaccine type&quot; = &quot;DTP-containing vaccines&quot;)
Referenced in the following locations:
 * Decision Tables: IMMZ.D2.DT.DTP.On-timestart
 * Tabs: DTP
"/>
    <designation>
      <language value="CQL"/>
      <value
             value="//Found in input/cql/IMMZD2DTDTPDelayedLogic.cql

define &quot;Primary DTP series is complete. Client is not due for tetanus and diphtheria booster dose&quot;:
  Encounter.&quot;Three DTP primary series doses were administered&quot;
    and Encounter.&quot;No tetanus and diphtheria booster doses were administered&quot;
    and Encounter.&quot;The latest DTP dose was administered less than 1 year ago&quot;



//Found in input/cql/DTPElements.cql

define &quot;Primary DTP series is complete. Client is not due for tetanus and diphtheria booster dose&quot;:
  //CQL AUTHORS: you need to insert stuff here
  // &quot;Immunization recommendation status&quot; = &quot;Not due&quot; (where &quot;Vaccine type&quot; = &quot;Tetanus and diphtheria-containing vaccines&quot;)

   // &quot;Completed the primary vaccination series&quot; = TRUE (where &quot;Vaccine type&quot; = &quot;DTP-containing vaccines&quot;)



//Found in input/cql/IMMZD2DTDTPOnTimeLogic.cql

define &quot;Primary DTP series is complete. Client is not due for tetanus and diphtheria booster dose&quot;:
  Encounter.&quot;Three DTP primary series doses were administered&quot;
    and Encounter.&quot;No tetanus and diphtheria booster doses were administered&quot;
    and Encounter.&quot;Client's age is less than 12 months&quot;



//Found in input/cql/DTElements-DTP.cql

          value="Discuss pregnancy intentions with client, consider risks of vaccination and make a clinical judgement. Clients planning a pregnancy are advised to avoid pregnancy for 1 month after rubella vaccination."/>

      <value
             value="//Found in input/cql/IMMZD2DTMeningococcalMenCLogic.cql

define &quot;Meningococcal immunization schedule is complete&quot;:
  &quot;Meningococcal immunization schedule is complete Case 1&quot;
    or &quot;Meningococcal immunization schedule is complete Case 2&quot;



//Found in input/cql/DTElements-Meningococcal.cql

define &quot;Meningococcal immunization schedule is complete&quot;:
  //CQL AUTHORS: you need to insert stuff here
  // &quot;Immunization recommendation status&quot; = &quot;Complete&quot;



//Found in input/cql/IMMZD2DTMeningococcalMenA1Logic.cql

define &quot;Meningococcal immunization schedule is complete&quot;:
  Encounter.&quot;One meningococcal primary series dose was administered&quot;



//Found in input/cql/IMMZD2DTMeningococcalQuad1Logic.cql

define &quot;Meningococcal immunization schedule is complete&quot;:
  Encounter.&quot;One meningococcal primary series dose was administered&quot;



//Found in input/cql/IMMZD2DTMeningococcalPolyLogic.cql

define &quot;Meningococcal immunization schedule is complete&quot;:
  Encounter.&quot;One meningococcal primary series dose was administered&quot;
    and Encounter.&quot;The latest meningococcal dose was administered more than 3 years ago&quot;
    and Encounter.&quot;Meningococcal booster dose was administered&quot;



//Found in input/cql/IMMZD2DTMeningococcalQuad2Logic.cql

define &quot;Meningococcal immunization schedule is complete&quot;:
  &quot;Meningococcal immunization schedule is complete Case 1&quot;
    or &quot;Meningococcal immunization schedule is complete Case 2&quot;



//Found in input/cql/IMMZD2DTMeningococcalMenA2Logic.cql

define &quot;Meningococcal immunization schedule is complete&quot;:
  Encounter.&quot;Two meningococcal primary series doses were administered&quot;


"/>

  </concept>
  <concept>
    <code
          value="Countries where varicella is an important public health burden could consider introducing varicella vaccination in the routine childhood immunization programme. However, resources should be sufficient to ensure reaching and sustaining vaccine coverage ≥ 80%. Decision-making on childhood varicella vaccination should also include consideration of the possible impact on herpes zoster."/>
    <display
             value="The number of doses recommended is dependent on the goal of the vaccination programme. One dose is sufficient to reduce mortality and severe morbidity from varicella but not to prevent limited virus circulation and outbreaks. Two doses have higher effectiveness and should therefore be recommended in countries where the programmatic goal is, in addition to decreasing mortality and severe morbidity, to further reduce the number of cases and outbreaks."/>
    <definition
                value="The number of doses recommended is dependent on the goal of the vaccination programme. One dose is sufficient to reduce mortality and severe morbidity from varicella but not to prevent limited virus circulation and outbreaks. Two doses have higher effectiveness and should therefore be recommended in countries where the programmatic goal is, in addition to decreasing mortality and severe morbidity, to further reduce the number of cases and outbreaks.
Referenced in the following locations:
 * Decision Tables: IMMZ.D2.DT.Varicella.1dose
 * Tabs: Varicella
"/>
    <designation>
      <language value="CQL"/>
      <value
             value="//Found in input/cql/DTElements-Varicella.cql

define &quot;Countries where varicella is an important public health burden could consider introducing varicella vaccination in the routine childhood immunization programme. However, resources should be sufficient to ensure reaching and sustaining vaccine coverage ≥ 80%. Decision-making on childhood varicella vaccination should also include consideration of the possible impact on herpes zoster.&quot;:
  //CQL AUTHORS: you need to insert stuff here
  // The number of doses recommended is dependent on the goal of the vaccination programme. One dose is sufficient to reduce mortality and severe morbidity from varicella but not to prevent limited virus circulation and outbreaks. Two doses have higher effectiveness and should therefore be recommended in countries where the programmatic goal is, in addition to decreasing mortality and severe morbidity, to further reduce the number of cases and outbreaks.


"/>
    </designation>
    <property>
      <code value="table"/>
      <valueString value="IMMZ.D2.DT.Varicella.1dose"/>
    </property>
    <property>
      <code value="tab"/>
      <valueString value="Varicella"/>
    </property>
  </concept>
  <concept>
    <code value="1-dose schedule"/>
    <display value="1-dose schedule"/>
    <definition
                value="1-dose schedule
Referenced in the following locations:
 * Decision Tables: IMMZ.D2.DT.Varicella.1dose
 * Tabs: Varicella
"/>
    <designation>
      <language value="CQL"/>
      <value
